title: The Dilettante.
content:
Merely because thou hast made a good verse in a language poetic,
    One which composes for thee, thou art a poet forsooth!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Dilettante.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
